ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact an administrator.
SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please log in again.
PASSWORD_SAME_AS_CURRENT: New password must be different from the current password.
PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ACTIVITY_LOG_PERMISSION_DENIED: You can only view activity logs for employees in your department.
PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS: Password has been reset successfully. Please log in.
RESET_TOKEN_SENT: If an account with that email exists, a password reset token has been generated.
NO_FILES_SELECTED: Please select at least one file to upload.
ATTACHMENT_UPLOAD_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to add attachments to this document.
DOCUMENT_ACCESS_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to access this document.
ATTACHMENT_DOWNLOAD_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to download this attachment.
ATTACHMENT_DELETE_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to delete this attachment.
LOGIN_FAILED_DEACTIVATED_LOG: Failed login attempt: Account "{email}" is deactivated
CATEGORY_HAS_DOCUMENTS: Cannot delete a category that has documents assigned to it.
DEPARTMENT_HAS_USERS: Cannot delete a department that still has users assigned to it.
